description.value: Burning a little luck to squeeze one more blow into the blur. Your opponents stop counting after the second hit anyway.

system.benefits: When you use Rapid Strikes, you can spend 2 Luck to make a fourth attack as part of the same action (add 3 to the skill die for this attack). All four attacks still count as one [Combat] action

usage.text: Costs 2 Luck when using Rapid Strikes
